name: Corn Bread I
recipeIngredient: 2 cups sour milk (add 2 tablespoons vinegar to sweet milk)
2 tablespoons melted fat or bacon grease
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the dry ingredients.
2. Add the eggs to the milk and stir into the dry ingredients.
3. Add the melted fat.
4. Pour the batter into a greased pan, 8-inch square.
5. Bake at 425°F for 20-30 minutes.
6. Serve hot plain, or butter generously and pour Bre'r Rabbit Syrup over (or Steen's Cane syrup).
